title: What Communication Actually Is
body:
Communication is the creation of shared meaning. It is what happens when a message moves from one mind to another and is understood well enough to affect thought or action.

The field includes speaking, writing, listening, body language, visual design, and the media channels that carry information.

Good communication is never just about saying more. It is about choosing the right words, the right structure, and the right medium for the audience and the moment.

That makes communication both an art and a system.
furtherReading: Made to Stick by Chip and Dan Heath
On Writing Well by William Zinsser
Thank You for Arguing by Jay Heinrichs
